title: Iraivanin Pugazh Paada Ingae
lyrics:
Iraivanin pugazhpaada ingae idhayangal pala kodi
Thuraiyellaam kadandhavanae un thunaiyondrae naam thaedi

1. Maraiporul aanavanae unnai
Manangalil sirai vaitthaom (2)
Kurayulla koyililae unnaik
Kondu naam kudi vaitthaom

2. Anbu un paer arivoom thooya
Arivendrum naam therivoom (2)
Inbam nee enak kolvoom nalla
Irakkam nee ena mozhivoom

title: Iraivanodu Uravu Kollum
lyrics:
Iraivanoodu uravu kollum naeramae
Inaindhu naamum baliseluttha vaarumae (2)
Paavigalaith thaedi vandha aandavar - 2
Paadham kazhuvip panigal seiya azhaikkum baliyidhu

1. Ulaga maandhar puriyum paavach chumaiyellaam
Orungae thoolil sumandhu sendra meetparae (2)
Vilaiyillaadha thamadhu senneer sindhiyae
Viruppamoodu niraivu seydha baliyidhu
Vaarungal vaarungal pugazhndhu paadungal
Meetparaam kiristhuvin arulai naadungal (2)
Vaazhvaiyae punidhamaai maattri magizhungal - 2

2. Mudivillaamal anbu seydha dhaevanai
Muzhumaiyaaga namakku thandha baliyidhu (2)
Pazhudhillaadhu pangugolla muyaluvom
Paavam neengith thooymaiyadaiya vaanduvom - vaarungal

title: Iraiyatchi Malaravaendum
lyrics:
Iraiyaatchi malaravaendum pudhuvaazhvu pularavaendum - 2
Vaarthai manuvaaga ingu needhi nilaikka vaendum - 2
Nilaimaaraumaa karamsaerdhumaa valuvaagumaa thuyar maarumaa
Nilaimaarumae karamsaerdhumae valuvaagumae thuyarmaarumae
Vinnum mannum saerum naatkal
Viraivil naamkaanboom

1. Paalum thaenum pozhindhidumae kaanaan kanavu balidhidumae
Paarai thanneer surandhidumae mannaa namadhu tharaivizhumae
Paalai nilangal yaavum ingu pasumai nirangal aagum (2)
Vinnum mannum saerum naatkal
Viraivil naamkaanboom

2. Singamum kandrum thozhamaiyil siruvar natpil paambarugil
Vaelum vaalum aermunaiyil
Thumukkigal ellaam pooppozhivil
Paadum manangal yaavum ini paasam niraindhadhaagum (2)
Vinnum mannum saerum naatkal
Viraivil naamkaanboom

title: Iraiyatchi Malarnthida Naam
lyrics:
Iraiyaatchi malarndhida nammil pudhuyugam pirandhadhu
Niraivaazhvu thodarndhida indru nammaiyae azhaikkudhu
Naam inaindhae sendriduvom
Pudhiya kaaviyam padaidhiduvom (2)

1. Norungiya manidham uyirpera azhindha vaazhvu valampera - 2
Tholaindha mugangal uruppera
Iraivan nammil ezhugindraar (2)
Karangal neetti azhaikkindraar pudhiya ulagam padaikkindraar

2. Pagaimai engum neengida anbil naalum uraindhida - 2
Niraivai engum kandidha iraivan nammil ezhugindraar - 2
Inaindhu vaazha panikkindraar piraril magizha azhaikkindraar

title: Iraiyatchiyin Manithargalae
lyrics:
Iraiyaatchiyin manidhargalae marimaindhanin seedhargalae
Irai azhaikkindraar anbil inaikkindraar
Pudhu ulagondraip padaitthida vaarungalae

1. Naam vaazhum indha boomia nalamaagida vaendaamaa
Nalivuttravar vaazhvinil needhi nindru nilaitthida vaendaamaa (2)
Iesuvae kaattiya vazhiyundu iyangida namakkoru neriyundu (2)
Edhir nookkudan vaarungal kadhir vilaindhidum kaanungal - 2

2. Indru maanidha idhayangalaellaam ondru saerndhida vaendaamaa
Iraiyaatchiyin maattrangal engum niraivaerida vaendaamaa (2)
Maanilam muzhuvadhum oru kudumbam maandhargaellaam udanpirappae (2)
Indha unmaiyai vaazhdhiduvom endha pagaiyinum vendriduvom (2)

title: Iraiyesu Azhaippaettru
lyrics:
Irai Aesu azhaippaetru avar anbu vazhisendru
Pudhuvaazhvu naam kaanuvom (2)
Adhai niraivaaga naam vaazhuvom
Niraivaazhvidhu pudhuvaazhvidhu - 2
Narcheydhi oliyaaga samaneedhi neriyaaga - 2
Iraith thandhaiyil agamagizhndhida
Iraiyarasinil igam malarndhida

1. Paraloga thandhaiyae um pugazh paaduvom - pudhup
Padaippaaga emai maattra arul vaanduvom (2)
Varalaaru pudhidhaaga uruvaakkuvom - adhil
Variyoorin varungaalam valamaakkuvom (2)
Vidudhalaiyin deepangalaai vilimbugalae maiyangalaai - 2
Ini vilangida endrum sirandhida pudhu vidiyalum indru pularndhida

2. Uyarvendrum thaazhvendrum nilaimaarumae - ini
Ulagengum ullangal uravaagumae (2)
Vidivelli ena Iesu ezhum boothilae
Vidudhalaiyin narcheydhi boobaalamae (2)
Iraimaganin thalaimaiyinil eliyavarin thozhamaiyil - 2
Pudhu ulagamum naam padaitthida pudhu samugamum adhil amaitthida

title: Iraivanin Aavi Nilalidavae
lyrics:
Iraivanin aavi nizhalidavae
Igamadhil avar pugazh paravidavae
Nammai azhaithaar anbil panithaar - avar
Panidhanait thodarndhidavae (2)

1. Variyavar sezhippinil vaazhndhidavum
Adimaigal vidudhalai adaindhidavum (2)
Aandavar arasil thuyarillai ena
Vaanadhira paraisaattridavum

2. Kurudarum oliyudan nadandhidavum
Kuvalayam needhiyil nilaidhidavum (2)
Arul nirai kaalam avaniyilae
Varuvadhai vaazhvinil kaattidavum

title: Irukkaram Kuvithu Siramthanai
lyrics:
Irugaram guvitthu siramdhanait thaazhtthi
Idhayatthai ezhuppi vanangiduvom (2)
Nam iraivanaith thudhithida vaareer
Nam Iesuvaip pugazhndhida vaareer (2)

1. Anaivarum ooriniam anaivarum oorudal
Amaippoom pudhu ulagam (2)
Iraiyaatchi amaindhida anbu sezhithida
Maatchimai kandiduvom (2)

2. Naadugalae naam nalamudan vaazha paaduvom amaidhi geetham (2)
Ingu poottigal neengi varumaigal agala
Neettuvom amaidhikkaram (2)

title: Ithaya Deepam Aetruvom
lyrics:
Idhaya deepam aetruvom indha nannaalilae
Innisai paadip pootruvom iniya dhaevanae
Indha anbendnum paadhaiyilae varum arthangal aayiramae
Indha sundharach choolaiyilae vandha sondhangal aayiramae
Ivai atthanai azhagum iraivan karangal
Inidhu varaindha kavidhaiyae

1. Vandhavaiyoo sendravaiyoo sondhamendru aedhumillai
Kandavaroo kondavaroo kaalam sollath thaevaiyillai
Kannedhiril kaanungal kartharin karunaiyai
Atthanaiyum avar munnae ethunai magimaiyae
Pugazhch chandhangal paadiyae nenjangal magizha vaazhthidu nalmanamae

2. Kattravaiyoo pettravaiyoo kartharindri aedhumillai
Satthiyamum sandhadhiyum saatchiyamum thaevaiyillai kannedhiril kaanungal

title: Ithayangal Malarattum Nammil
lyrics:
Idhayangal malarattumae nammil
Innisai muzhangattumae (2)
Iraiyarul valarattumae adhu igam ellaam paravattumae

1. Annalae ingu namai azhaithaar - im
Mannilae pongum vaazhvalithaar (2)
Varaiyillaa varangalai namakkalithaar - 2 tham
Karaiyillaak karunaiyaal namai meettaar

2. Anbilae malargindra visuvaasam - adhu
Kundrinmael olirgindra thiruvilakkaam (2)
Needhiyum unmaiyum adhan sudaraam - 2 avai
Theedhillaa vaazhvukkuuch chaandrugalaam

3. Irulellaam azhithida oli konarndhaar - nenjil
Arul valam sezhithida namaiyazhaithaar (2)
Thirumagan anbinai chuvaitthidum naam - 2 adhai
Tharaniyar magizhdhidap pagirndhiduvom

title: Itho Itho Oru
lyrics:
Idhoo idhoo oru yaatthirai - um
Irakkam vaendum thiru yaatthirai (2)
Idhayatthai thagarkkum idarpaadidaiyae
Ummaiyae nambum yaatthirai - 2
Oo iraiva oo nallavarae en kookkural kaettarulhum
Oo iraiva oo vallavarae emmaik kaatthida ezhundharulhum (2)

1. Kadarkadandha em yaatthirai em kaivilangu thagaravae
Udaluyir marandhu pooraadum yaam
Um thunaiyil vellavae (2)
Odukkappaattoorin uyirppae
Emmaiyurimaik kulamaakkumae - 2

2. Idhayatthinaal oru yaatthirai um innuravai adaiyavae
Gadhiyattru vaadum soodhararkku kaigodutthu vaazhavae (2)
Pagaiyattru vaazhum anbin ulagai
Ururaiyaiyaayt thaarumae (emakku) 2

title: Kaalai Ilangkathirae
lyrics:
Kaalai ilangkadhirae nee kadavulait thudhikka ezhu
Soolaippudhumalarae nee iraivanin thaalil vizhu
Aalaya thirumaniyae nee aandavan kuralai asai
Ngaalath thavakkulamae nee arultharum baliyai isai

1. Thiruppali niraivaettrum guruvudan inaindhu kondu
Thiralaai varugindra koottatthin anbu kandu (2)
Perumvarak kalvaari arumbali ninaivaagum - 2
Thirumarait thaganappali peedatthil kuzhumividu

2. Varunguruvudan saerndhu paramanai vaazhtthi nindru
Thiruppalip peedatthilae deyveega vaazhvadaindhu (2)
Siramae thaal panindhu chindhanaiyai iraikkalitthu - 2
Paramudhal tharugindra arutpali pangaerpaai

title: Kuzhalodum Yazhodum
lyrics:
Kuzhaloodum yaazhoodum inidhaana thamizhoodum
Dhaevaadhi dhaavanaip pugazhndhaetthuvom (2)
Thiriyaega dhaevanukku pugazhaarangal
Puvi aalum vaendhanukku pudhuppaadalgal

1. Aandavarae nalla maippanaam
Naamellaam avaradhudha aadugalaam (2)

2. Vaazhvinai eendhavar aandavaraam
Naamellaam avaradhudha kuzhandhaigalaam (2)

title: Magizhnthidai Maanilamae
lyrics:
Magizhndhidaai maanilamae undhan
Maindhanin maatchiyilae indru
Paerarul paayndhadhu kuruthuvatthaal
Endru pugazhndhidaai thirumaraiyae

1. Ulagatthin paerolhiyaai vaazhum
Ullatthin aarudhalaai (2) - endhak
Kaalamum vaazhdhidum ezhil nilaiyaam
Inbak kaatchiyae kuruthuvamae (2)

2. Kuruthuva neechunaiyaai thigazh
Kiristhuvai eendravalhae (2) - indru
Kaayndhidum paarukku neer thelikka
Varum gurukkalaik kaatthiduvaai (2)

title: Magizhvinai Vithaiththida
lyrics:
Magizhvinai vidhaitthida manangalai uyartthida
Uravinaraai varuvom
Mannavan Aesuvin ponmozhi nadandhida
Anbinil vaazhdhiduvom irai
Anbinil vaazhdhiduvom (2)

1. Idhayangal inaikkum anbukku inaiyaai
Boomiyil ondrumillai
Iraivazhi vaazhdhidum muraiyidhu therindhaal
Pagaimaiyin thollai illai (2)
Piritthidum suyanala vaergalai aruppoom
Pudhuvazhi padaitthiduvom (2) naam iraivazhi vaazhdhiduvom

2. Manidharin urimaigal marutthidum samugam
Iraivanin kudumbamillai
Eliyavar vaazhvhugal azhivadhu thodarndhaal
Iraivanum uyirppadhillai (2)
Anaivarum vaazhdhidha nammaiyae alippoom
Pudhuvazhi padaitthiduvom (2) naam iraivazhi vaazhdhiduvom

title: Maname Iraivanil Sangamam
lyrics:
Manamae iraivanil sangamam
Manidham uravilae sangamam
Ilamai deepamae vaazhvilae sangamam
Niraivaazhvu peravae unnil sangamam - 2
Sangamam sangamam naadhanae naan unnil sangamam (2)

1. Kadalgalae alaigalil sangamam
Kavignanae kavidhaiyil un sangamam
Manidhanae iraivanil sangamam
Punidhanae ayalaanil iraisangamam

2. Nenjamae needhiyil sangamam
Naermaiyae unmaiyil un sangamam
Thiramaiyal padaitthoonil sangamam
Unarvugal uravilae irai sangamam

title: Maniyosai Kaetaen
lyrics:
Maniyoosaik kaettaen kuzhaloosai kaettaen
Aandavan sandhidhi oodoodi vandhaen (2)

1. Aandavan illatthil vaazhndhida vandhaen
Aandavan pugazhinaip paadida vandhaen (2)
Aandavan arulinai adaindhida vandhaen - 2
Aandavan vaazhinaich chuvaitthida vandhaen

2. Iraivanin naamathhaip poottrida vandhaen
Iraivanin vaarthaiyaik kaettida vandhaen (2)
Iraivanin virundhinai arundhida vandhaen - 2
Iraivanin aaseerai aettrida vandhaen

title: Nanmaigal Seitha Iraivanukku
lyrics:
Nanmaigal seydha iraivanukku
Nandriyin baliyaich chelutthida vaareer - 2
Nanmaigal naamae adaivom vaareer

1. Ullatthait tharuvadhu thiruppaliyaam
Udaindhadhendraal adhu perumbaliyaam (2)
Kodaigal peruvadhu thagum vazhiyaam - 2
Kurayinaip pookkum koovazhiyaam

2. Vaanatthai nookkidum narum fugaipool
Vaarungal ullatthai ezhuppiduvom (2)
Anaitthaiyum anbudan kondu vandhom - 2
Aandavan thirumun padaitthiduvom

title: Niraiarul Vaazhvu Payanaththilae
lyrics:
Niraiyarul vaazhvu payanatthilae
Paeraniyaai naam selvom
Iraivanin thiyaga baliyinilae
Kalandhidavae naam inaivom (2)

1. Avaniyilae iraivanukkaai
Arppanam seydhavar paeruprottroor - enum
Arutchaandru pagarndhidavae anbargalae ondru koodiduvom (2)
Anbu ullangal naam inaivom
Inba vellatthil nanaindhiduvom (2)

2. Anbarasai agilamengum
Paravidach cheybavar paeruprottroor - andha
Arul vaazhvu paravidavae deepangalaai nindru erindhiduvom (2)
Unmai deyvatthai naam thozhuvom
Vinnin selvatthil thilaitthiduvom (2)

title: Oliye Oliye Ezhilae
lyrics:
Oliyae oliyae ezhilae varuga
Uyirae uyirae iraiyae varuga
Vazhiyae vazhiyae valamae varuga
Vizhiyae vizhiyae viraivaai varuga

1. Moovulagiradhivanae mudhalvanae varuga
Mutthamizh poottridum thalaivanae varuga (2)
Mupperum kaalamum kadandhava varuga
Mudhalae mudivae mubamaiyae varuga

2. Karunaiyin kadalae kanivudan varuga
Kalangamillaa oli tharavae varuga (2)
Alaigalin kalaiyae kadavulae varuga
Kanivae thunivae thunaiyae varuga

title: Oliyil Nadanthu Vaa
lyrics:
Oliyil nadandhuvaa sagodharaa
Oliyil nadandhuvaa sagodhari
Oliyaam Kiristhuvil nadandhu vaa
Vazhiyaam Kiristhuvil nadandhu vaa (2)
Aesu nam oli - 3 (2)

1. Avaril vaazhndhaal irulillai
Avaril vaazhndhaal paavamillai (2)
Meetkum Dhaevan avarandroo - 2
Mannikkum Iraivan avarandroo

2. Avaril vaazhndhaal varumaimillai
Avaril vaazhndhaal thunbamillai (2)
Nirappum Dhaevan avarandroo - 2
Inbatthin Iraivan avarandroo

title: Ondru Kooduvom Ondrai
lyrics:
Ondru kooduvom ondraayp paaduvom
Aandavan Iesuvin baliyil inaivom (2)
Nam iraivanaippoottruvom
Nam Iesuvaip poottruvom
Thooya aaviyaip poottruvom
Thiruppaliyil kalandhiduvom (2)

1. Irakkatthaip pozhindhu paavatthhaip pookkum
Mannippu vazhibaadu
Iraivanin kuralai idhayatthil olikkum
Iraivaakku vazhibaadu
Aesuvin udalaik kurudhiyai unavaai
Utkollum vazhibaadu
Vaazhvil aanandham malarndhidach cheyyum
Nandriyin vazhibaadu - nam iraivanai

2. Aaviyil unmaiyil iraivanait thozhuvadhu
Uyirulla vazhibaadu
Aandavar Iesuvai meetparaai aerpadhu
Iraivanin velippaadu
Kadavulait thozhuvadhum manukkula saevaiyum
Samanilaip panbaadu
Aesuvin seedaraaych chaandrugal pagarvadhu azhagiya nilaippaadu

title: Pularnthathae Puthu Vaanam
lyrics:
Pularndhadhae pudhuvaanam pudhiyadhaai oru boomi
Punidha Dhaevanin aalayam pudhu vaazhvin azhaippaagavae (2)
Appaa anbaana deyvamae ummai
Aaraadhithom thudhithom (4)

1. Kanavaai nindra kaatchigal ingu nanavaai maariyadhae
Kanalaai Dhaeva aaviyin arul pirasannam paravidudhae (2)
Punalaai aalaya valappuram irundhu pudhuvaazhvu pongudhae adhan
Karaiyil vaazhvoor kaalangalellaam kanidhandhu vaazhvarae

2. Kizhakkae kaanum vaasalil nam nambikkai udhikkindradhae
Azaikkum thandhai paasatthil nam aanmaa thazhaikkindradhae (2)
Isaippoom innisai yaazhinai meetti
Iraiyavanin maatchiyai - naam inaivom avardham
Iyakkatthin vazhiyae idar neengi oongavae

title: Punitha Nal Baliyinil
lyrics:
Punidha nal baliyinil kalandhiduvom
Thunivudan Iesuvin vazhi nadappoom (2)
Koodiduvom ondraayk koodiduvom
Pagirndhiduvom endrum magizhdhiduvom (2)

1. Uravilum thodarpilum thooya vazhi
Thooimai anbu namadhu mozhi (2)
Tharanikkuth thaevai needhi vazhi
Inaindhae nadappoom naeyavazhi - koodiduvom

2. Imayamum kumariyum inaindhidavae
Idhayam uravil valarndhidavae (2)
Saadhiyum paedhamum maraindhidavae
Saatchiyaai vaazhvom Iesu vazhi - koodiduvom

title: Puthiya Vaanagamum
lyrics:
Pudhiya vaanagamum pudhiya vaiyagamum malarum naalidhu
Pudhiya idhayamum pudhiya aaviyum aniyum naeramidhu
Alaiyena ezhavoom aniyenath thiralvom
Aandavar Iesuvaip pugazhvom (2)

1. Iraivanin sondhap pillaigal naam
Iraiyarasin kuruthuvak kulamum naam (2)
Urimaai vaazhvilae namai azhaitthaar - indha
Ulagam vaazhavae namaip panitthaar
Uravin baalangal naam amaippoom - ingu
Urugum vizhigalai naam thudaippoom - 2

2. Thammaiyae Iesu baliyenath thandhu
Vidudhalaai vaazhvait thandhullaar (2)
Karunai iraivanil naam nilaippoom - manak
Kadavu nilaigalai naam thirappoom
Karangal iraivanin balikkaanaal - ingu
Kadavul arasudhaan pirakkaadhoo - 2

title: Puthiya Bhoomiyae
lyrics:
Pudhiya boomaiyae pudhuppaattu paadi vaa
Punidha naalilae irai maatchi kaana vaa (2)
Vaanilae koolamaai vaana thoodhar paadavae
Poovilae naamumae Dhaevan peedam kooduvom (2)

1. Vinnoorellaam kondaadavae
Innaalaiyae ponnaalena
Mannoorumae kondaduvom
Nam paadalum vinnearavae
Maraivaazhvut thaedum naamelloorum jeevaoottru Iesupaadham
Naadi vaazhvait thiyagamaakkuvom (2)

2. Sangaagiyae panbaaduvom sangeedhatthaal ondraaguvom
Ennaalumae anbaanavar pon thaegatthil pangaaguvom
Irai vaakku koorum vaazhvut thaedi maanidatthin jeeva naadi
Naadhan Iesu paadhai selluvom (2)

title: Puthiya Paathaiyil
lyrics:
Pudhiya paadhaiyil purappattuch selvom
Naanilam engum pudhiyadhaakkuvom
Pazhaiyana kalaivom paadhai maattruvom
Iesu Kiristhuvil pudhuppadaippaavom (2)

1. En vazhiyaai allaamal thandhaiyidam varuvadhavillai
Naanae vazhiyum unmaiyum uyirum endraar (2)
Punidha paadhaiyil vaazhvai adaindhida - 2
Senriduvom putthulagam padaitthiduvom naam - 2

2. Vaazhbavanum naanalla Iesu ennil vaazhkindraar
Avar thunaiyil ulagam enakku kuppaiyaagumae (2)
Iraisaatchiyaai vaazhndhu kaattuvom - 2
Iraiyarasai mannulagil nilainaattuvom - 2

title: Puththoli Veesida Poomanam
lyrics:
Puttholi veesida boomanam kamazhndhida pudhiya naal pirandhadhu
Arul oli thoondrida agamengum choozhndhida
Punidha naal malarndhadhu pudhiya manam kondu punidha peedam sendru
Thooyavar baliyil kalandhiduvom (2)

1. Iraivan nammai azhaitthadhaala naamom
Iraivanin pillaigal aanom
Iraivan nammaith thaerndhadhaal
Arasak kuruthuva thirukkoottamaanom
Paraisaattruvom avar pugazhai
Paarengum olikkach cheyvom (2)
Vaarungal vaarungal iraivanaip pugazhvom
Paadungal paadungal iraivanil magizhvom (2)

2. Iraivanin anbuch cheyalinaal naamum
Avaradhu udamaigal aanom
Iraivanin anbu vaarthaiyaal
Arul aruviyil nanaindhavaraanom
Anugich selvom avar paadham
Azhiyaadha vaarthai kaetpom (2) vaarungal

title: Puthumai Thaedugindra Ithayangalae
lyrics:
Pudhumai thaedugindra idhayangalae
Pudhup baliyinil kalandhida vaarungalae (2)
Puviyin aandavar irukkindraar avar
Punidha idhayangalil pirakkindraar (2)
Ezhuga ezhuga iraigulamae ingu
Iraivanin aasi adaindhidavae (2)

1. Idarpadum iraivanin oozhiyarae nam
Iraivanin paniyinai aettridavae (2)
Igamadhil inidhae azhaikkindraar - 2
Thalaivan thangath thalaivan Iesuvin vazhiyinil
Indhat tharaniyai naalum vazhinadatthidavae panikkindraar

2. Aezhaigal vaazhvai uyartthidavae
Engum eliyorkku narcheydhi uraitthidavae (2)
Arul tharum aandinai arivikkavae - 2
Udhayam thaedum idhayangallaam unmai vidudhalai
Adaindhidum nilaiyai un vazhiyae avar kaankindraar

title: Puthuyugamum Piranthathindru
lyrics:
Pudhuyugamum pirandhadhindru pudhu vaazhvum malarndhadhindru
Aarpparippoom agamaghizhvom aanandha panbaaduvom (2)
Allaelooyaa - 10
Valladhaevavan vaarthaiyae aa ..manidha uruvil vandhadhae aa
Varalaattrin maiyam aanadhae (2)
Pudhu samudhaayam malarchchi kondadhae irai
Samudhaayam ezhuchchi kondadhae

1. Adhimai vilangu anaitthum indru azhindhu poonadhae
Urimaai vaazhvu ulaginilae udhayamaanadhae aa (2)
Eliyavarum nalindhavarum - 2
Aesupran vaakkinilae aetram kaanavae
Engum needhi endra seydhi unmaiyaanadhae (2)

2. Aetratthaazhvu paagubaadu engum maraiyudhae
Iraiyarasin samatthuvam ini edhilum malarudhae aa...(2)
Vaanagamum vaiyagamum - 2
Vidudhalaiyin raagangalaich chaerndhu paadudhae
Pudhiya vaanam pudhiya vaiyam puviyil thoondrudhae - 2

title: Sakthiyanava Jeevanayagaa
lyrics:
Sakthiyaanavaa jeevanaayagaa anbaalae vaazhum dhaevaa - 2
Aadhi andhamaai arul needhi unmaiyaai
Endrendrum vaazhum dhaevaa

1. Makkal yaavarum anbil akkalikka vaa
Akkalikka vaa anbil akkalikka vaa
Achamindriyae vaazhvil otthuzaikka vaa
Otthuzaikka vaa vaazhvil otthuzaikka vaa
Thikkanaitthumae unnai edhirolikka vaa
Edhirolikka vaa unnai edhirolikkavaa
Yuttham neekkiyae amaidhi udhikkach cheyya vaa
Udhikkach cheyya vaa amaidhi udhikkach cheyya vaa
Boomi engumae nenjam yaavum thangiyae
Anbaalae vaazhum dhaevaa

2. Varumai pookkiyae valamai magizhvalikka vaa
Magizhvalikka vaa valamai magizhvalikka vaa
Samatthuvatthilae manidha maanbuyarttha vaa
Maanbuyarttha vaa manidha maanbuyarttha vaa
Aanavatthaiyae vendru panivaiyaakka vaa
Panivaiyaakka vaa vendru panivaiyaakka vaa
Thaazhchi kondavar ullamb ookkam ootta vaa
Ookkam ootta vaa ullamb ookkam ootta vaa
Needhi naermaiyil endrum naalum vaazhave
Anbaalae vaazhum dhaevaa

title: Sammathamae Iraiva
lyrics:
Sammadhamae iraivaa sammadhamae thalaivaa - un
Maalaiyilae oru malaraagavum paalaiyilae siru manalaagavum
Vaazhndhida sammadhamae iraivaa maarida sammadhamae (2)

1. Thayangum manadhudaiya naan unakkaagavae
Un panikkaagavae vaazhndhida varam tharuvaai (2)
Karuvaaga enaip padaitthhu uyar
Kanmaniyaai enai valartthu (2)
Karamadhilae urup paditthu karutthudanae ennaik kaakkindraai

2. Malaiyaai naan kanittha perum kaariyamum
Uyar kaaviyamum maraindhae poonadhu (2)
Thiruvaaga unai ninaitthu uyar
Uravaagavae nenjil paditthu (2)
Un peyaraiis chaarridavae
Nalam tharavae ennai anaikkindraai

title: Thalaivaa Unai Vananga
lyrics:
Thalaivaa unai vananga
En thalaimael karam kuvitthaen
Varamae unaik kaetka naan
Siramae thaal panindhaen (2)

1. Agalpool eriyum anbu adhu pagalpool manam paravum - 2
Nilaiyaai unai ninaitthaal
Naan malaiyaai uyarvadaivaen - 2

2. Neerpool thooimaiyaiyum en ninaivil oodachcheyyum - 2
Saettrinil naan vizhundhaal ennai seekkiiram thookkividum - 2

title: Thamizhaal Um Pugazh
lyrics:
Thamizhaal un pugazh paadi dhaevaa naan dhinam vaazha
Varuvaayae thirunaayagaa varam tharuvaayae uruvaanavaa (2)

1. Enaichoozhum thunbangal kanaiyaaga varumpoodhu
Thunaiyaagi enaiyaalbavaa (2)
Mananooyil naan moozhgi madigindra pozhudhangu - 2
Gunamaakka varuvaayappaa enai unadhaakki arulvaayappaa

2. Ulagellaam irulaagi udanallor sendraalum
Vazhikaattum oliyaanavaa (2)
Needhaanae enakkellaam ninaivellaam needhaanae - 2
Naadhaa un pugazhpaaduvaen enai naalellaam nee aaluvaai

title: Theepaththin Oliyinil Inaivom
lyrics:
Deepatthin oliyinil inaivom
Thiruppali selutthida viraivom (2)
Manidham malarndhida punidham valarndhida

1. Nalvaazhvin deepangalaai ingu
Naalellaam olira vaarungalae
Namvaazhvin thaevaigalai dhinam
Nallorkku Iesu thandhiduvaar
Avan illam dhinam vandhaal - nam
Ullangal oliyil niraindhidumae (2)
Anbu seyyum ullangalae
Iraivanin arul perum illangalae (2)

2. Iesuwoodu naam inaindhaal endrum
Nam vaazhvil thoolvikku idamillaiyae
Nanmai seydhu nee magizndhaal ingu
Unmai oli unakku kidaitthidumae
Vaarthai ingu manuvaanaar - nam
Vaazhvinil endrum kudigondaar (2)
Anbu seyyum ullangalae
Iraivanin arul perum illangalae (2)

title: Thaevanin Thiruvadi Selvom
lyrics:
Dhaevanin thiruvadi selvom
Thaediyae avararul peruvom (2)
Ondraaga inaindhu baliyinil kalandhu - 2
Unnadhar avarilae magizhvom - Allaelooyaa - 8

1. Thannaiyae baliyaai thandhittha Dhaevan
Tharaniyil nammai azhaikkindraar (2)
Samatthuvam nilaithida manidhamum malarndhida
Mannavan baliyinil inaindhiduvom
Ini ondraaga ulagam padaippoom
Pudhiyadhoor vaazhvai peruvom (2)

2. Iraivanin sondhap pillaigalaai
Vaazhndhida nammai azhaikkindraar (2)
Samatthuva ulagil sangamamaagida
Maabaran baliyinil inaindhiduvom - ini ondraaga

title: Thinam Thinam Valam
lyrics:
Dhinam dhinam valam varum engal kaaladi
Nalam tharum valam tharum deyvath thaaladi (2)

1. Saran endru thaedinaal thondrit thaetruvaar
Aran naamae anjarkendru aattral nalguvaar (2)
Varam koodi naalum thandhu vaazhach cheyguvaar - 2
Karam kooppi siram thaazhthi naalum paaduvom

2. Karaiyindri thunbam vaazhvil naalum thoondrinum
Maraindhidum malarndhidum inbam vaazhvilae (2)
Iraigaram tharum varam poodhum vaazhvilae - 2
Karaipookki kurai neekki vaazhvoom paarilae

title: Thinamthorum Unainaanum
lyrics:
Dhinandhoorum dhinandhoorum unainaanum thaedi
Varuvaen un sannidhi endrum needhaan vaazhvin gadhi
Ippoodhum eppoodhum kavinooru paadi
Thozhuvaen un sannidhi endrum needhaan vaazhvin gadhi
Oru paarvai poodhum oru vaarthai poodhum
Oru theendal adhu poodhumae endrum
En vaazhvae unadhaagumae

1. Vazhiyengae enatthaedi vizhiyaengumpoodhu
Naan thaedum vazhiyaagum un sannidhi (2)
Varumkoodi unainaadi manam thaedumpoodhu
Naan kaanum gadhiyaagum un sannidhi
Nadhi koodum kadalaaga vizhimoodum imaiyaaga
Kavipaadum kuyilaaga kaniyoottum suvaiyaaga
Vandha endhan sondhamae vaazhum undhan bandhamae - orupaarvai

2. Soogangal sumaiyaagi naan vaadum poodhu
Sumadhaangum karamaagum un sannidhi (2)
Sondhangal iniyengae ena aengumpoodhu
Uravaaga enaich chaerum un sannidhi
Payir moodum paniyaaga uyir koodum uravaaga
Mazhai thaedum nilamaaga manam thaedum mozhiyaaga
Vandha endhan sondhamae vaazhum undhan bandhamae - orupaarvai

title: Thirukkulamae Ezhunthiduga
lyrics:
Thirukulamae ezhundhiduga arul pozhiyum baliyinilae
Orunginaivom karam kuvippoom
Unnadharaiip poottruvom (2)
Aahaa sandhoosham perugidhudhae avar sannidhi kaangaiyilae (2)

1. Aanandhamudanae avar thirumunnae koodiduvom - 2
Aandavarae nam kadavul endru paadiduvom - 2
Avarae nammaip padaitthaar avarukkae sondham naam
Avar padaippugal naam avar pillaigal naam
Avar mandhaiyin aadugal naam

2. Innisai muzhanga iraivan vaasal nuzhaindhiduvom - 2
Pannisaiyoodu avaradhu peedam choozhndhiduvom - 2
Avaraip pugazhdhiduvom avar peyar vaazhthiduvom
Avar nallavaraam avar vallavaraam avaranbae vazhinadatthum

title: Thirupaliyai Seluthidavae
lyrics:
Thiruppaliyaich selutthidavae thiruppanigal aattridavae
Iraimakkal anaivarum inaindhu vaarungal (2)
Anbu manam oongidavae arul vaazhvil nilaiperavae - 2
Anaivarum ondraaga inaindhu vaarungal

1. Orae kudumbamaaga vaazhum illam amaiyavae
Namakkellaam oruvarae thaayum thandhaiyaam (2)
Padaippugal ellaam anaivarukku sondham
Pagirndhu vaazhum panbu nam anburavin bandham
Adutthavar nalanil akkarai kolvom
Avar vazhiyil avar thunaiyil iraivaakku uraitthida

2. Iraivaarthai vazhiyil pudhu ulagu padaikkavae
Iraiyaatchiyae namadhu ilatchiyak kanavaai (2)
Vevvaeru nadhigal sangamikkum kadalil
Vevvaeru madhamum ondraagum vaazhvil
Baedhangal illai soogangal illai
Avar vazhiyaal avar thunaiyaal iraivaakku uraitthida

title: Ulagaththin Oliyae Unmaiyin
lyrics:
Ulagatthin oliyae unmaiyin sudarae
Umadhillam naadi vandhoom
Manidham malarndhida punidham valarndhida pudhu ulagam padaippoom (2)
Vaarungal iraimakkalae irai baliyinil inaindhidungal (2)

1. Vaarthai nammil manuvaanaar aezhai manidharaai vandhudhitthaar (2)
Mannaiyae vinnaai maattridavae
Mudivillaa vaarthaiyai namakkalitthaar
Vaarthaiyae namadhu vaazhvaanaal
Pudhiya manidharaai maariduvom (2)

2. Aengum vizhigal thuyar neekka thaanae baliyaai kaiyalitthaar (2)
Ulagam mudiyum kaalam varai endrum nammoodu irukkindraar
Iesu baliyinil meetpundu iraiyarul peravae vazhiyundu (2)

title: Un Illam Ennum
lyrics:
Un illam ennum aalayatthil
Nuzhaigaiyilae iraivaa
Inbam pongidum innal ellaam theerndhidum
Arul thangidum irul ellaam neengidum
Endhan ullam ennum maaligaiyil (2)

1. Thaen sindhum malargalaai vandhoom
Thaedi undhan paadham amarndhiduvom (2)
Un vazhiyil nadandhiduvom un oliyil vaazhndhiduvom - 2
Uyiril inbangal sondhangal aayiram - engal

2. Aalayatthil olikkum maniyoosai
Aanandhatthil engal kuraloosai (2)
Vaedhanaigal maraindhidumae thaendhuligal niraindhidumae - 2
Uyiril unnarul inbangal aayiram - engal

title: Un Ithaya Vaasal
lyrics:
Un idhaya vaasal thaedi varugindraen
En idhayamb uraiya ennil vaarumae (2)
Neeyillaiyael naanillaiyae - 2
Naan vaazha ennullam va

1. Kaalangal maaralaam koolangal maaralaam
Kaattrasaiya marakkalaam kadalasaiya marakkalaam (2)
Un anbu endrendrum maaraadhaiyaa
Un ninaivil naan endrum vaazhvaenaiyaa

2. Kuyil paada marakkalaam mayilaada marakkalaam
Nayamudanae nanbarum ennai vittup piriyalaam (2)
Un anbu endrendrum maaraadhaiyaa
Un ninaivil naan endrum vaazhvaenaiyaa

3. Uruvangal maaralaam urumaarip poogalaam
Urugum manam karugalaam uravum ennai verukkalaam (2)
Un anbu endrendrum maaraadhaiyaa
Un ninaivil naan endrum vaazhvaenaiyaa

title: Un Thiruppugazh Paadiyae
lyrics:
Un thiruppugazh paadiyae un peedam varugindroom
Un idhayak koovil thannil kudiyirukkavae
Em karangalai uyartthiyae un paadham panigindroom
Em iraivaa endrum neer emmaik kaappadhaal

1. Karunai deyvam unnil ennaik kaana vizhaigindraen
Karthar Iesu endrum ummaik koovi azhaikkindraen (2)
Kalvanaip pool ummai naan igazhndhaalum (ketta) - 2
Kannimaippool endrum emmaik kaakkindraai

2. Anbukkaaga aengi alaiyum idhayam dhannaiyae
Anbinaal aatkondu aalum thalaivanae (2)
Arulum un anbinaich naan marandhaalum (dhinam) - 2
Arutkaram neetti ennai aravanaikkindraai

title: Uravin Karangal Ondrai
lyrics:
Uravin karangal ondraai inaiyum naeram
Pagirvin pookkal baliyaai malarum naeram
Nam Iesuwoodu aniyaai varuvom - avar
Vaarthaigalai ini vaazhvaai anivom
Varuga anbin iraiyaatchiyae varuga varuga
Ezhugha manidha iraiyuravil ezhugha ezhugha (2)

1. Namai veezhthidum sumai yaavaiyum baliyaakkidumun
Madha baedhangal inap pilavugal nammil maattriduvom (2)
Manidham magizhndhidum eliyoorin uyarvil
Iraimai malarndhidum anbaal ezhum ulagil (2) Varuga...

2. Iraivaarthaiyai nidham vaazhvinil nigazhvaakkiduvom
Perum magizhvinaip pirar vaazhvilum pagirvaakkiduvom (2)
Uzhaikkum uyirgaliil deyveegam uraiyum
Uravin sakthiyil urimaik kadhir udhikkum (2) Varuga

title: Uravu Malarum Punitha Idam
lyrics:
Uravu malarum punidha idam aalayam aalayam
Ullam ondru saerum idam aalayam aalayam (2)
Unarvu perugida uyarvu adaindhida
Unmai vazhi sellum vaazhvum aalayam aalayam - 4

1. Iyarkai kaatthidum maandhar vaazhidam aalayam aalayam
Pagirndhu vaazhndhidum uyirgal uraividam aalayam - 2
Manidhatthai uyirena madhitthidum ullangal
Maanudar vaazhvukkaayt thanaitharum nenjangal
Nambikkai seydhi sollum nanbargal
Unmaikkaay uyirai izhakkum jeevanganal
Elloorum iraivan uraiyum aalayam - 2

2. Pasumai soolaigal paadum paravaigal aalayam - 2
Kaattrum vaanamum kadalum malaigalum aalayam - 2
Vidiyalin kuralena olitthidum kalaigalum
Kadavulae un pugazh paadidum kavidhaiyum
Nalvaarthai paesugindra naavugal
Nalloorin paadhai sellum paadhangal
Ellaamae iraivan uraiyum aalayam - 2

title: Uthayanagal Thaedum Ithayangal
lyrics:
Udhayangal thaedum idhayangal dhanilae iraiyarul malara
Manangal pookkal sindha vasandham vaazhvil ponga
Vaarum iraikulamae (2)

1. Iravinil thavitthitta vaelaiyilae - muzhu
Nilavaai nilamadhil nadandhavanae
Idhardhanil thuditthinkitta pozhudhinilae - engal
Idhayatthil malarndhidum sudaroliyae
Paavam nammilae maraiyaadhoo Dhaevan
Paadham nammilae padhiyaadhoo
Soogangal maraindhida arulpurivaai

2. Kavalaigalaal manam kalangaiyilae - undhan
Karangalaal ennaith thaanga vandhaai
Aarudhal thaedi naan alaiyaiyilae - undhan
Vizhigalil karunai mazhai pozhindhaai
Pudhiya uravugal malarndhidavae - undhan
Anbin baliyinil kalandhidavae
Oorkulamaai ondru koodivandhom

title: Vaikarai Pozhuthin Vasanthamae
lyrics:
Vaigaraippozhudhin vasandhamae nee vaa
Vidiyalait thaedum vizhigalil oli thaa
Vaazhvu malarndhida vaan mazhaiyena vaa
Vazhiyirulinilae valarmadhiyena vaa
Ingu paadum indha jeevanilae paramanae nee vaa

1. Alaigalillaa kadalnaduvae payanamena en vaazhvu
Amaadhiyengum amaadhiyena payanamadhai naan thodara (2)
Iraivaa en iraivaa idhayam ezhuvaai
Niraivaai enilae nidhamum uraivaai
Endhan vaazhvu olira vaasal thirandhu enai azhaitthida vaa

2. Idhar varinum thuyar varinum innuyirdhaan pirindhidunum
Enaippiriyaa nilaiyenavae inaipiriyaa thunaiyenavae (2)
Iraivaa en iraivaa

title: Varam Kaettu Varugindraen
lyrics:
Varam kaettu varugindraen iraivaa - en
Kural kaettu arulaayoo thalaivaa (2)

1. Pagaisoozhum idhayatthuch chuvaraiyellaam - en
Paasatthaal thagarkkindra varam kaetkindraen (2)
Pugaisoozhndhu irul vaazhum manadhil ellaam - 2 un
Peyar solli oliyaettra unaik kaetkindraen

2. Nalamellaam enakkendru thaedum gunam - ini
Naaldhoorum irakkindra varam kaetkindraen (2)
Baliyaaga pirarkkennai alitthittapin - 2 en
Parisaaga unai kaetkum varam kaetkindraen

title: Varuga Varuga Magizhvudanae
lyrics:
Varuga varuga magizhvudanae varugavae
Varavu endrum inidhaai amaigavae
Mangala nilavaai engum thigazhdhida
Mannavan aruludan endrum vaazhndhida
Indha vaanum nilavum kaattrum kadalum
Yaazhum isaiyum idhamaai olikka varugavae - 2

1. Sumaiyin paluvaal soorndhiruppoorae
Suyanalap pidiyil sidhaindhiruppoorae
Iraimagan Iesu azhaikkiraar
Idhayak kadhavai thirandhu unnai azhaikkiraar
Panivaai avar paadham nam adaindhidavae - indha vaanam

2. Aabaael baliyai virumbiya Dhaevan
Aabiragaam baliyil negizhdhitta Dhaevan
Nammaiyae anbin baliyaai kaetkiraar
Nambiyae avarin paadham saerndhiduvom
Nalangalaalae nam vaazhvil niraindhidavae - indha vaanam

title: Varuga Varuga Vasantha Malargalae
lyrics:
Varuga varugavae vasandha malargalae
Malarnidavae magizhindhavae viraindhu vaarungal (2)
Ezhugha ezhughavae iraivan kaanavae - 2
Inimai thadhumba innisaiyil isaindhu vaarungal

1. Sumai sumandhu soorndha vaazhvai marandhu vaazhuvom
Sugam niraindhu malarndha vaazhvai magizhindhu vaazhuvom (2)
Aanandham kaanavae avarilae kooduvom
Irugarangal viritthavaraai
Azhaikkum iraivan kuralait thaedi (2)

2. Ulagam yaavum ini avarin aatchi aakkuvom
Unmai vidhaithu ulagai avarin maatchiyaakkuvom (2)
Amaadhiyin dhoodharaai avarilae vaazhuvom
Aadhavanaai oliveesi azhaikkum iraivan kuralait thaedi (2)

title: Varungal Iraimakkalae
lyrics:
Vaarungal iraimakkalae
Iraimagan kaattiya muraidhanil baliyida
Vaarungal iraimakkalae

1. Kuruvudan koodi kudumbamaai maari
Iraivanai undu punidharaai maarida

2. Iraivanin vaarthaiyai idhayatthil aetru
Inivarum vaazhvil pudhu oli peravae

3. Pagaimaiyai ozhitthu pulangalai arutthu
Nalangalai naadiyae nanmaigal adaindhida

title: Varuvai Indru Kristhava
lyrics:
Varuvaai indru kiristhavak kulamae
Kiristhu viduttha azhaippinai aetru - varuvaai

1. Vaedhatthin niraivaam vaarthaiyalikkum
Virundhinai unna viraindhaai kulamae (2)
Unbavar ellaam oor kulamaagi - 2
Unnadha baliyai uvandhae seluttha - varuvaai

2. Thiruneeraattaal vandhadhu urimai
Thiruppali dhanaiyae selutthum arumai (2)
Kiristhuvai ariyaa ulagukkup pudhumai - 2
Kiristhavak kulamae undhan perumai - varuvaai

title: Vidiyalai Thaedi Varugindraen
lyrics:
Vidiyalait thaedi varugindraen un
Vaarthaiyai endhan vaazhvaakkaavae iraivaa (2)

1. Nilaiyaanadhu endrum nilaiyaanadhu
Un vaarthaigal endrum nilaiyaanadhu
Kuraiyaadhadhu sattrum kuraiyaadhadhu adhil
Uraindhidum anbu kuraiyaadhadhu
Ingu uyir vaazhgiraen ummil niraivaagavae (2)
Undhan panivaazhvai muzhudhaaga niraivaettravae - indru

2. Chindhaiyilae undhan sondhangalae
Endrum ooyaadha alaiyaaga ezhaigindradhae
Mandhaiyin aayanae en Iesuvae endhan nenjamae
Umaikkaanavae vizhaigindradhae
Nittham kavi paadumae naadhaa umakkaagavae (2)
Undhan inidhaana kanavinai nanavaakkavae - indru

title: Viduthalai Raagangal
lyrics:
Vidhudhalai raaganggal vidhiyalin geedhanggal
Muzhanggida vaarunggalae
Pudhu ulagamaitthida pudhuvazhi padaitthida
Anbudan vaarunggalae
Vaarungal vaarungal aalayam vaarungal
Anaivarum vaarunggalae - 2

1. Anbukkaagavum amaidhikkaagavum Iesu manuvaanaar
Unmaikkaagavum needhikkaagavum avarae baliyaanaar (2)
Ondru kooduvom unardhu vaazhuvom - 2
Suyanalam neekki pirarnalam kaatthu
Anbinil naam inaivom - Vaarungal ...

2. Aezhai eliyavar vaazhum idhangalae iraivan veedaagum
Varumaip pidiyilae alarum kudilgalae
Iraivanin mozhiyaagum (2)
Pagirndhu vaazhuvom pasiyai neekkuvom - 2
Iraivanin arasyin inimaiyaik kaana
Indrae muyandriduvom

title: Vinnaga Thanthaiyin Pillaigalae
lyrics:
Vinnaghat thandhaiyin pillaigalae
Aandavar Iesuvin nanbargalae
Ulagirku oliyaai vaazhndhidavae
Anbin baliyinil inaindhiduvom (2)

Kondaaduvom indru kondaaduvom
Aandavarin naalai poottrip paaduvom
Panbaaduvom nalla panbaaduvom
Padaitthitta Dhaevanaiyae paadippugazhvom

1. Aesuvin vaarthaigal kaetthiduvom
Idhayatthil adhanai aetriduvom
Anbenum mazhaiyaal palan koduppom
Anaivarkkum pagirndhae vaazhndhiduvom (2)
Iraivanin pillaigal naam endrae
Igamadhil anaivarkkum saatriduvom - Kondaaduvom

2. Paavatthin sumaigalai irakki vaippom
Parigaaram purindhae thooimaiyaavom
Piraranbup paniyinil magizhndhiduvom
Thooyanadhal aaviyil kanigoduppom (2)
Uyirtharum vinnagha unavinaiyae
Virundhinil undu vaazhvadhaivom - Kondaaduvom
